arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Bayern Munich: Unai Emery hands surprise start to academy graduate
arts.sum: Unai Emery hands a surprise start to an Aston Villa academy graduate for the Champions League fixture against Bayern Munich on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Kane shakes off injury concerns, starts vs. Villa
arts.sum: Harry Kane shrugged off injury concerns and has been named in Bayern Munich's starting lineup for their Champions League clash with Aston Villa on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Aston Villa vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The lineups for Wednesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich have been announced.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley set for Villa Park watching brief as he readies latest England squad
arts.sum: As well as Harry Kane, Ollie Watkins and Ezri Konsa, interim boss Carsley is keeping a close eye on in-form Morgan Rogers.

arts.ttl: Why Prince William supports Aston Villa as Prince of Wales set to attend Bayern Munich fixture
arts.sum: One fan who will certainly have an eye on proceedings is none other than Prince William, Prince of Wales, who is an ardent supporter and is looking forward to his club's return to the Champions League - and will be at the Bayern game. It's Villa Park's first game in European football's premier competition since 1983 - the year after Villa won the European Cup, with Unai Emery's side back in the big time after a superb 2023/24 campaign.

arts.ttl: Why Ozzy Osbourne supports Aston Villa as Black Sabbath legend sends Champions League message
arts.sum: However, one of the more intriguing supporters of the Villa is 75-year-old Black Sabbath legend Ozzy Osbourne . Since then, the former X-Factor judge has visited Villa Park where she picked up a new shirt for Ozzy and 'found his Preds'.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist drops Aston Villa tease as he meets Prince William
arts.sum: Rangers great and football pundit Ally McCoist received his OBE from Prince William at Windsor Castle on Wednesday - and the pair may or may not have discussed Aston Villa during their encounter! BirminghamLive has launched its very own WhatsApp community to give you the opportunity to receive the latest Aston Villa news straight to your messages.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa v Bayern Munich on TV in Champions League tonight
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot makes ONE change to side that beat Wolves... plus the latest from Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Champions League ties of Liverpool vs Bologna and Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich as both Premier League sides look to build on opening matchday wins.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany knows expectations are high, ready for battle with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Aston Villa will meet-up for a Champions League showdown in just a few hours and Vincent Kompany knows it will not be easy. After wrecking Dinamo Zagreb in the last Champions League match, Kompany said that he noted the expectations are very high at Bayern Munich.
